generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor defined within BIM by Building Control Engineers for ambient temperature monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Humidity sensor defined within BIM by Building Control Engineers for indoor humidity monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy sensor defined within BIM by Building Control Engineers for room occupancy detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data streamed from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto, ModelDrivenEngineering
]

instance HumidityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time humidity data streamed from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HumidityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto, ModelDrivenEngineering
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data streamed from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto, ModelDrivenEngineering
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC actuator modeled within BIM by Building Control Engineers for controlling heating, ventilation, and air conditioning systems"
]

instance LightingController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting controller modeled within BIM by Building Control Engineers for managing building lighting systems"
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for secure, scalable real-time data exchange between IoT devices and Digital Twin platform"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveMaintenanceService
]

instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management and state synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:enables ResourceOptimizationService, DecisionSupportService
]

instance UnrealEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine for high-fidelity interactive 3D visualization and immersive simulation capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, DecisionSupportService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering for automatic generation of deployable Digital Twin artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveMaintenanceService, ResourceOptimizationService, DecisionSupportService
]

instance BIMGeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric representation from Building Information Modeling enriched with Building Control System components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineering, UnrealEngine
]

instance BehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral model encapsulating control logic and device interactions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineering
]

instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical building asset within Architecture, Engineering, Construction, and Operations domain"
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor, OccupancySensor, HVACActuator, LightingController
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing real-time monitoring insights for building systems to stakeholders"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for predictive analytics in maintenance and performance forecasting"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveMaintenanceInsight, PerformanceForecastInsight
]

instance ResourceOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service optimizing resource utilization and energy efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyEfficiencyInsight, ResourceOptimizationInsight
]

instance DecisionSupportService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enhancing decision-making capabilities for architects, engineers, and facility managers"
    DTDFVocab:provides DecisionSupportInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization of real-time system status for monitoring and control"
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights for equipment maintenance scheduling based on performance data"
]

instance PerformanceForecastInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasting of building performance metrics for proactive optimization"
]

instance EnergyEfficiencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommendations for optimizing energy consumption and reducing waste"
]

instance ResourceOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven recommendations for optimal resource allocation across building systems"
]

instance DecisionSupportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comprehensive insights supporting informed decisions throughout the building lifecycle"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Bidirectional communication enables control signals from the digital twin to the Building Control System (BCS), with system feedback confirming execution. Specific command types, message formats, and validation protocols are not detailed in the document."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle comprises initial device modeling within the BIM environment by Building Control Engineers, followed by Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) transformation to structured representations, automatic generation of deployable artifacts, real-time data synchronization between physical and digital systems, interactive visualization for monitoring and control, and modular integration of custom services to support operational evolution."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation of digital twin fidelity uses the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to quantify synchronization between digital and physical systems, measuring how well the DT reflects its physical counterpart."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto facilitate data exchange, with the Hono/Ditto Configurator extracting metadata such as tenant ID, device ID, and endpoint addresses. Network topology, bandwidth, latency, reliability, redundancy, and security protocols are not described in the document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Model-driven framework with modular architecture and standardized extension points supports scalable deployment and runtime configuration management for dynamic adaptation. Specific hosting platforms, computational requirements, and deployment models are not detailed in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework standardizes BIM semantics through a model-driven transformation pipeline, creating a unified semantic foundation for Building Control System (BCS) components. It ensures compatibility with AECO-specific standards such as BIM and employs standardized extension points to enable interoperability with existing industry systems and facilitate integration of custom services."
]
